calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Phillip R. Morgan, Esq. 982-1300 for defts & moving parties Miu Cam Vong and Vu Hoai Dong; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Shauna L. Matlin, Esq. 305-5637 for pltfs & opposing parties w/Bich Trinh Diem, sworn & examined; Vu Hoai Duong, 595-4468 with interpreter Cindy Vong.
RULING: Argued and the Court denies the motion, 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court.
